titleStmt.title: SII 34.2: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 2. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājādhirāja I, 27+1st year = A.D. 1046.

Following a brief version of the king's eulogy is mentioned a gift of land, by a Paṇṇaṉ Chaturasaṅgātaṉ, for feeding annually 1000 devotees including śivayōgis and tapasvis, in the temple of Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-Mahādēva at Tirumaṇañjēri, a part (pāl) of Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu in Rājēndrasimha-vaḷanāḍu, on the occasion of the Paṅguni-uttiram festival. The land located at Mūlaṅguḍi in Nallāṟṟūr-nāḍu, which was a dēvadāna of the temple, had been reclaimed from an uncultivable garden land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiṅkaḷErtaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkīḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu ceṅkOlOccik karuṅkalikaṭintu maṉṉupal
lūḻiyuṭ ṭeṉṉavar mūvaruḷ māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyāṉāp parumaṇip pacuntalai porukaḷattarintu vīrakēraḷaṉai yāṉaikkiṭuvit tacaivil cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉai
tticaikeṭat tollaiyil mullaiyūrt turatti Olkalil vēṇāṭṭaraicaic cēṇāṭṭotukki mēvupukaḻ rāmakuṭamūvar keṭa muṉintu vēlaikeḻu kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟu
ttu Ākōmallanumañcak kevutalāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ cēṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭappayaṉuṅ kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟōṭumaṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritara vikkiyu
m vicaiyātittaṉuṅ karumuraṭ cāṅkamayyaṉuñ camarapīruvottuṭaiya nimircuṭarp poṉṉōṭu mayaṅkeri puraviyōṭu makappaṭap piṭittu tanṉāṭai cayaṅkoṇ
ṭu toṉṉār koḷḷippākkaiyuḷ ḷerimaṭuttu villavar mīṉavar veñciṉa cāḷukkiyar vallavar mutaliṉar vaṇaṅka vīṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭa cōḻa neṉṉum U
yarnta perumpukaṭ kōvirājakēcari varmmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirāja devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatinetirāmāṇṭu rājēntraciṅka vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkai nāṭṭuk kaṅkaikoṇṭa cōḻaccaru
ppētimaṅkalattuppāl tirumaṇañcēri tirukkaṟṟaḷi mahādevar paṅkuṉi Uttirattirunāḷil Uṭaiyāraṭiyār civayōkikaḷun tavassikaḷumāka Āyiram Aṭiyārkaḷ Āṭṭāṇṭu tōṟum A
mutuceyya Oruvarkku nellukkuṟuṇiyāka Eṇpattumukkalanēy tūṇi nellukku Uṭaiyār tēvatāṉam nallāṟṟūr nāṭṭu mūlaṅkuṭiyiṉ mēlaikkuḷattukkuk kiḻak
kumpurōcaṉavāykkut teṟkkum piccakaḷ piccaṉukkun teṅkantōṭṭattukkum mēṟkum teṅkantōṭṭattiṉ mēlaikkollai Aṟumāvukku vaṭakkum Āka Iṉṉāṉ kellai
kkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kollaippāḻ nilattai Eḻunūṟṟukkala nellaṭṭit tirutti panmāheśvara viḷākameṉṟu pērkūvappaṭṭa nilam Araiyēy mūṉṟumā Iṉṉi
la muṉpu kollaip pāḻāyaṭaittu ceṉṟu varunellup patiṉaiṅkalam Iṉṉellup patiṉaiṅkalamum Ic ceyyil pōkattilēy tēvaṟku nīkki
nīkki niṉṟa nellu Ittēvar kaṉmikaḷēy Āṭṭāṇṭutōṟum Orupōtu Āyiram Aṭiyāraic cantirātittaval Amutu ceyvikka
Iṉṉivantaṅkaṇṭu Uṭaiyāṉ paṇṇaṉ caturacaṅkātaṉ Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
